title: Multiple environments or workspaces for big projects

posts.author: ppedersen85 (Patrick Pedersen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Our company (4000+) are testing monday.com for our construction projects and some of the projects has been created in each separate environments (different URLs or tenants).

Is it better to have “everyone” in the same env/tenant and have one project for each workspace instead?

What’s your best practice on structuring big construction projects?
